code: `long mod = 1000000007; long dp[][] = new long[high + 1][zero + 1]; dp[0][0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= high; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= zero; j++) { dp[i][j] = dp[i - 1][j]; if (j > 0) { dp[i][j] = (dp[i][j] + dp[i - 1][j - 1]) % mod; } if (i >= zero) { dp[i][j] = (dp[i][j] + dp[i - zero][j]) % mod; } } } return (int) (dp[high][zero] - dp[low - 1][zero]);`
